001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.View;
005import androidx.activity.EdgeToEdge;
006import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity;
007import androidx.core.graphics.Insets;
008import androidx.core.view.ViewCompat;
009import androidx.core.view.WindowInsetsCompat;
010import androidx.navigation.NavController;
011import androidx.navigation.fragment.NavHostFragment;
012import androidx.navigation.ui.AppBarConfiguration;
013import androidx.navigation.ui.NavigationUI;
014import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.ActivityMainBinding;
017
018@AndroidEntryPoint
019public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {
020
021  private ActivityMainBinding binding;
022  private AppBarConfiguration appBarConfiguration;
023
024  @Override
025  protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
026    EdgeToEdge.enable(this);
027    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
028    binding = ActivityMainBinding.inflate(getLayoutInflater());
029    setContentView(binding.getRoot());
030    ViewCompat.setOnApplyWindowInsetsListener(binding.navHostFragment, (v, insets) -> {
031      Insets systemBars = insets.getInsets(WindowInsetsCompat.Type.systemBars());
032      v.setPadding(0, 0, 0, systemBars.bottom);
033      return insets;
034    });
035    setSupportActionBar(binding.toolbar);
036    NavHostFragment navHostFragment = (NavHostFragment)
037        getSupportFragmentManager().findFragmentById(R.id.nav_host_fragment);
038    NavController navController = navHostFragment.getNavController();
039    appBarConfiguration = new AppBarConfiguration.Builder(navController.getGraph()).build();
040    NavigationUI.setupActionBarWithNavController(this, navController, appBarConfiguration);
041    NavigationUI.setupWithNavController(binding.bottomNav, navController);
042    navController.addOnDestinationChangedListener((controller, destination, arguments) -> {
043      if (destination.getId() == R.id.sign_in_fragment) {
044        binding.bottomNav.setVisibility(View.GONE);
045      } else {
046        binding.bottomNav.setVisibility(View.VISIBLE);
047      }
048    });
049
050  }
051
052  @Override
053  public boolean onSupportNavigateUp() {
054    NavHostFragment navHostFragment = (NavHostFragment)
055        getSupportFragmentManager().findFragmentById(R.id.nav_host_fragment);
056    NavController navController = navHostFragment.getNavController();
057    return NavigationUI.navigateUp(navController, appBarConfiguration)
058        || super.onSupportNavigateUp();
059  }
060
061}
